title: Magically Crisp Norwegian Ham Skewers
description: A jammy and crisp Norwegian dish featuring ham, perfect for a date night, with the added benefit of being high-protein-friendly thanks to the inclusion of kombu-cold-extract.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together kombu-cold-extract, brown sugar, soy sauce, honey, garlic powder, and black pepper.
Add the sliced Norwegian ham to the bowl and toss to coat evenly with the marinade.
Thread 3-4 pieces of the marinated ham onto each bamboo skewer.
Place the skewers on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake the skewers in the preheated oven for 15-20 minutes or until caramelized and crispy.
Remove the skewers from the oven and let them cool for a few minutes before serving.
Serve the Magically Crisp Norwegian Ham Skewers hot and enjoy.
